km.England: ប្រទេសអង់គ្លេស

zh.lifeSummary: Sir Ailward de Bury是Sir James de Bury的兒子，於1100年出生在英國。他和Wife of Ailward de Bury至少有1個兒子。他去世在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir Ailward de Bury是Sir James de Bury的儿子，于1100年出生在英国。他和Wife of Ailward de Bury至少有1个儿子。他去世在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bury
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Bury in Lancashire (now part of Greater Manchester), or from some other similarly named place. The placename comes from the dative case, byrig, of Old English burh ‘fortified place’.

Walloon and French: habitational name from any of several places so named, in Wallonia (Belgium) and Oise (France). The placename is from Buriacum, the name of a Gallo-Roman estate, composed of the personal name Burius + the locative suffix -acum. This surname is also found in the Flemish part of Belgium.

variants.name: Buri
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Markus, Kurt.
Swiss German and South German: from an Alemannic pet form of the personal name Burkhard (see Burkhart ).
Italian: patronymic or plural form of   Buro  .

variants.name: Burgh
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from one or other of the ten English places named Burgh in northern England and East Anglia, or the six named Brough in Derbyshire, Nottinghamshire, Westmorland, and Yorkshire. All these are from Old English burg, burh, Middle English burgh ‘massive earthwork, fortification; manor, borough’. Compare Bury . The placename Burgh is pronounced as borough. The surname Brough arose equally from places now called Burgh and Brough, and is the more common form of the surname in modern Britain, where it is pronounced bruff or broof (/brʊf/). The Scottish surname was probably brought in from Yorkshire. For the surname in Ireland see Burke .

nameMeanings.name: Ailward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Aylward
meanings: English: from a Middle English personal name, Ailward, Old English Æthelweard, composed of elements meaning ‘noble’ + ‘guardian’. This English name has been established in Ireland since at least the 16th century.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: Sir Ailward de Bury was born in 1100, in England as the son of Sir James de Bury. He had at least 1 son with Wife of Ailward de Bury. He died in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Ailward de Bury est né en 1100, à Angleterre, fils de Sir James de Bury. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Wife of Ailward de Bury. Il est décédé dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Sir Ailward de Bury wurde 1100 in England, als Sohn von Sir James de Bury geboren. Er hatte mit Wife of Ailward de Bury mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Sir Ailward de Bury è nato il nel 1100 nel England come figlio di Sir James de Bury. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Wife of Ailward de Bury. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Ailward de Buryは1100年にイギリスでSir James de Buryの息子として生まれた。彼はWife of Ailward de Buryとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Ailward de Bury(은)는 1100년 영국에서 Sir James de Bury의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Wife of Ailward de Bury(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir Ailward de Bury nasceu em 1100, em Inglaterra filho de Sir James de Bury. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Wife of Ailward de Bury. Ele faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Ailward de Bury родился в 1100 г. в местности Англия. Его отца звали Sir James de Bury. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Wife of Ailward de Bury. Он умер в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Sir Ailward de Bury nació en 1100, en Inglaterra como hijo de Sir James de Bury. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Wife of Ailward de Bury. Murió en su pueblo.
